title: Ocean RiPP-phage interactions - Results
key_findings: TrRiPP successfully identifies RiPPs from fragmented ocean metagenomes
Diverse previously unknown RiPP families discovered in ocean microbiome
Strong association between RiPPs and antiphage defense mechanisms
RiPPs likely play significant roles in prokaryote-phage competition

ripp_discovery_outcomes.novelty: Numerous previously unknown RiPP families identified
ripp_discovery_outcomes.diversity: High structural and functional diversity in ocean RiPPs

tripp_model_performance.advantage: Bypasses need for intact PTM enzyme detection
tripp_model_performance.capability: Effective on highly fragmented metagenomic contigs
tripp_model_performance.comparison: Overcomes limitations of traditional methods like antiSMASH

coexpression_analysis_findings: High prevalence of antiphage defense-related proteins co-expressed with RiPPs
Phage-related protein families correlate with RiPP expression
Strong evidence for RiPP-phage interaction networks

ripp_phage_interaction_network.connectivity: Complex interactions linking multiple levels of microbial biology
ripp_phage_interaction_network.insights: Reveals RiPP involvement in prokaryote-phage coevolution

antiphage_defense_evidence.mechanism: RiPPs likely function as antiphage defense peptides
antiphage_defense_evidence.comparison: Similar to known antiphage roles of anthracyclines and aminoglycosides
antiphage_defense_evidence.novelty: Previously underappreciated role of peptidic metabolites in phage defense

ecological_significance: RiPPs critical for ocean microbiota survival in virus-rich environment
Virus-to-microbial ratio 10:1 creates strong selective pressure
RiPP production represents major metabolic investment
Ocean microbiota equipped with diverse defensive secondary metabolites
research_implications: Deep learning enables RiPP discovery from complex metagenomes
Ocean microbiome contains vast untapped RiPP diversity
Novel RiPP families with therapeutic potential

metagenomic_mining_advancement.outcome: Comprehensive assessment of complex microbiota biosynthetic potential
metagenomic_mining_advancement.impact: Opens new avenues for unexplored environments

future_directions: Characterization of novel RiPP families discovered
Industrial and therapeutic applications of ocean RiPPs
Extension to other complex microbiota environments
